scripts.repo:verify: npm run check:encoding && npm run roadmap:sync && npm run qa:coverage && npm run audit:customer:gate && node repo-task.js verify
scripts.repo:verify:ci: npm run check:encoding && npm run roadmap:sync && npm run qa:coverage && npm run audit:customer:gate && node repo-task.js ci
scripts.test:contract:baseline: npm run test:contract:baseline --prefix MealQuestServer && npm run test:contract:baseline --prefix MealQuestMerchant && npm run test:contract:baseline --prefix meal-quest-customer
